prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约9728→11400→9871→13337→14450，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约4600名；2025年基准约14450名，为近年最高（最难进）；本省物理类计划2021年5人→2022年7人→2023年7人→2024年8人→2025年6人→2026年5人，较2025年缩招1人（-16.7%），缩招使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–70区间，属中上水平211；2024年声誉偏负面（师德师风事件），但抖音热度 为高热（总排名第15），短视频曝光量高；未见投档异常记录；中国语言文学A-、心理学A-、教育学A-，共3个A-学科，师范类学科基础扎实。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度2024年为分化观望，计算机类、电子信息类持续高热推荐；本省物理类考生2021年约11.7万→2025年约19.2万→2026年估算约20.4万（按历史比例） ，考生规模持续增长，竞争加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批441分，较2024年449分略降；陕西师范大学位于西安，属西北地区，对福建考生而言跨省就读，地 域偏好一般；该校在福建招生规模较小（5–8人），本地招生占比不高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年缩招1人（缓解竞争）、福建省物理类考生持续增长（加 剧竞争）及声誉偏负面等因素，再考虑考生规模增长带来的额外竞争压力，预测最低位次约13205名，区间12705–13700名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学（师范）、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术（创新实验班）、软件工程、人工智能）
- 心理学类（含心理学（师范类）、应用心理学）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12705–13700名以内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（12705名以内）可重点冲刺数学类、计算机类等热门专业；位 次在区间中后段建议优先考虑心理学类、物理学类等中等难度专业；位次接近区间上限需以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9728 → 11400 → 9871 → 13337 → 14450, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 4600 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 14450, the highest (most difficult to enter) in recent years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 5 in 2021 → 7 in 2022 → 7 in 2023 → 8 in 2024 → 6 in 2025 → 5 in 2026, a reduction of 1 student (-16.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable position in the 60–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the reputation in 2024 was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but Douyin popularity was high (15th overall), with high short video exposure; no abnormal application records; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, with a total of 3 A- disciplines, and a solid foundation in teacher-training disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher-training/education majors in 2024 was divided and wait-and-see, while computer and electronic information majors remained highly recommended; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province was about 117,000 in 2021 → 192,000 in 2025 → an estimated 204,000 in 2026 (based on historical proportions), with continuous growth in examinee numbers, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 441 points, slightly down from 449 points in 2024; Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, in the northwest region, which is a cross-province study for Fujian examinees, with generally average regional preference; the university's enrollment scale in Fujian is small (5–8 students), with a low proportion of local enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of declining historical rankings, the reduction of 1 student in 2026 (easing competition), the continuous growth of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, along with additional competitive pressure from the growth in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13205, with a range of 12705–13700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training), Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology (Innovation Experimental Class), Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Psychology (including Psychology (Teacher Training), Applied Psychology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Materials Science
- Chemistry (including Chemistry (Teacher Training), Applied Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12705–13700, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 12705), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science; if your ranking is in the middle to later part of the range, it is recommended to prioritize moderately difficult majors such as Psychology and Physics; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you should rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2017 → 1924 → 1869 → 1624 → 2421. The ranking was optimal in 2024 (1624), but significantly dropped to 2421 in 2025, the highest (most difficult to enter) in recent years, with large fluctuations. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 4 in 2021 → 5 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 10 in 2024 → 6 in 2025 → 3 in 2026, a reduction of 3 (-50%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a mid-to-upper level 211 university. In 2024, reputation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), with high popularity on Douyin (ranked 15th overall) and high exposure. No abnormal filing records were observed. Chinese Language and Literature rated A-, Education rated A-, with disciplinary relevance to History Category enrollment majors (Foreign Languages and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Political Science and Administration).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of teacher/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, foreign language majors generally wait-and-see. The number of History Category examinees in the province was approximately 78,000 in 2021 → 60,000 in 2025 → estimated 64,000 in 2026 (based on historical proportion), with a trend of first decreasing then increasing, slightly intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 450 points, up from 431 points in 2024. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, requiring cross-province study, with average regional preference. Enrollment scale in Fujian is small (3–10 people), with a low local enrollment proportion. Considering factors such as the significant ranking drop in 2025, the 50% enrollment reduction in 2026 (greatly alleviating competition), the slight increase in History Category examinee numbers (slightly intensifying competition), and the weak pressure from examinee growth and control line increase, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1795, with a range of 1346–2244.
